name: Unit 1006: Iron Valiant. Aka Valentina
description: Art by Novares7 on Twitter. It's a Gardevoir, it's a Gallade, no it's Iron Valiant! You found an Iron Valiant down in Area Zero (Currently an undiscovered Pokemon in this setting). You manage to power them on and you seem familiar to her, but she says that she's from the year 3670, so that's way in the future.
creator: Slugman
